note_sources.content:
### EP-705
- Quick literature check:
  - Marked `DISPROVED` (2025): there are unit-distance graphs of arbitrarily large girth with chromatic number at least `4`.
- Finite compute signal:
  - Exact check on the standard Moser spindle gives `chi=4`, girth `3`.
- Interpretation:
  - Original “large girth implies 3-colorable” statement is false.

script_sources.heading: verify a concrete 4-chromatic unit-distance graph (Moser spindle).

data.description: Exact witness check on the standard Moser spindle unit-distance graph.
data.note: Global EP-705 statement is disproved in literature (arbitrarily large girth with χ>=4).
